result.summary: The page looks mostly intact, but a few layout issues stand out: some horizontal content is clipped at the right edge, and the fixed bottom navigation appears to cover part of the game grid.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game tiles, hiding part of the last visible row and making those items feel cut off.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the main content so it clears the fixed footer, or make the footer non-overlapping on this screen size.

issues.description: The rightmost game cards in the grids are partially cut off at the edge of the screen, so the full tiles and labels aren’t visible.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid/container width, spacing, or horizontal scroll behavior so cards are fully visible or clearly presented as scrollable content.

issues.description: The top category rail is clipped on the right, with the last tab only partially visible ('Hot Ga...'), which makes the row look cramped.
issues.suggestion: Increase right-side padding or show the carousel more clearly as horizontally scrollable so partially hidden items don’t look accidentally cut off.
